metadata.title: SYNGO_CC_986
metadata.comment:
Rationale: Immunostaining of Myosin VI in mature rat hippocampal neurons show partial colocalization with the synaptic marker PSD-95 (Fig. 2A)

Biochemical fractionation showed that Myo6 is enriched in the PSD fraction (Fig. 2 B) from the cortex, hippocampus, and cerebellum.

Myosin VI deficient neurons have fewer synapses and dendritic spines (Fig. 5) and display defective AMPAR internalisation (Fig. 7).

Myosin VI associates with PSD proteins (Fig. 6). Experimental description: M&M:
Sv/wt (Myo6sv/J) mice were purchased from The Jackson Laboratory

For immunohistochemistry 1-yr-old C57/B6J mice (The Jackson Laboratory) were used.

C57/B6J mouse brains or Lewis rat brain regions were homogenised and used for PSD fractionations

IPs were done by extracts made from adult rat brain.
